- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature

- [ ] Build succeeds (`pnpm build`)

  - [ ] macOS
  - [ ] Linux

## Breaking changes

- [ ] This PR has security implications (touches `repository.ts`, `import-export.ts`, or Rust file operations)
